address: 上海市黄浦区黄陂南路338号
head_chef: 陈志评 (Chen Zhiping — 2026 Black Pearl 年轻主厨奖 / Young Chef Award winner)
restaurant_group: 遇外滩 / Meet The Bund Group (the Skyline 外滩 flagship + the new 新天地 location)
signature_dishes: 创新闽菜 tasting menu integrating tea pairing
tea-and-dish fusion sets in the dedicated 茶寮 lounge area
vibe_and_space: Upscale design-forward space with a dedicated 茶寮 (tea lounge) area integrated into the dining flow. The 2026 Black Pearl insights call out this 餐茶融合 (food-and-tea fusion) format as the distinguishing feature of the upgrade. Reservation-driven, formal service register.
one_paragraph_recommendation: The single most institutionally validated new Shanghai opening of 2025-2026 — promoted from Black Pearl 二钻 (2025) to 三钻 (2026) in just one year, and head chef Chen Zhiping won the 2026 年轻主厨奖. Min cuisine (闽菜) has been historically under-represented in Shanghai's fine-dining scene; Yu Waitan is now the canonical reference. The food-and-tea pairing format is genuinely novel — not a gimmick, but treated as a parallel tasting track. Recommend for a special-occasion or business dinner where you want institutional authority + something Shanghai didn't have last year. Per-person ~941¥ puts it in the 8½ Otto e Mezzo / Bo Innovation tier.
